steps.t: You should read Gazathrug's orders to his lieutenants. <rgb=#FF0000>Note: The orders can be found in your inventory.</rgb>
Gazathrug's outpost can be found in the southern part of Máttugard. You should search Gazathrug's outpost for signs of the Orc Captain.
Gazathrug's outpost can be found in the southern part of Máttugard. You should talk to Hetbrúda at Gazathrug's outpost.
